Localization.Description: A new role with critical permissions can indicate an attacker attempting to escalate privileges and/or gain persistence in the Aria Operations for Logs system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created role "{object.name}" with critical permissions in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted role "{object.name}" with critical permissions in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
